description: A dark graphic titled 'Total Fiscal Burden of Illegal Aliens'. Three figures across the top show total national expenditures, total tax contributions and total burden on taxpayers. An equation of a flag icon minus a money-bag icon equals '$150.7 BILLION'. Below, large white and red text reads 'Each Illegal Alien Costs the American Taxpayer Nearly $8,776 ANNUALLY', with a FAIR source line at the bottom.
notable_text: Total Fiscal Burden of Illegal Aliens; $150.7 BILLION; Each Illegal Alien Costs the American Taxpayer Nearly $8,776 ANNUALLY; Source: FAIR
